description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a modern urban style, featuring a short-sleeved oversized shirt adorned with a large gold chain and a bandana covering the lower half of his face. His arms are tattooed and he wears fingerless gloves, adding to his street-inspired appearance. The shirt has a bold graphic on the back, and he is dressed in knee-length shorts layered over longer under-shorts. He wears high-top sneakers and sports a contemporary, voluminous hairstyle. The overall look is accessorized with visible jewelry and a confident, upright stance. The figure's attire and accessories suggest a fashionable, streetwise individual commonly seen in urban environments.
description: A stylish adult male pedestrian in urban streetwear, featuring an oversized shirt, gold chain, bandana, tattoos, and high-top sneakers.
description_view_0: Back view showing the oversized shirt, gold chain, bandana, tattoos, and high-top sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the layered shorts, arm tattoos, and the profile of the bandana and hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large graphic on the shirt, both arms with tattoos, and the overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm tattoos, glove, and the side profile of the layered shorts and sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: oversized short-sleeved shirt, layered knee-length shorts, fingerless gloves, and high-top sneakers with visible jewelry and a bandana
